name: India
summary: Day 67. **INDIA MEA: 'UNACCEPTABLE' STATEMENT ON FUJAIRAH ATTACK — 3 INDIAN NATIONALS INJURED MAY 4** in Iranian drone strike on UAE Fujairah Oil Industry Zone. MEA called for 'immediate cessation of these hostilities and the targeting of civilian infrastructure and innocent civilians'; affirmed India 'continues to stand for dialogue and diplomacy'; called for 'free and unimpeded navigation and commerce through the Strait of Hormuz.' Indian Embassy Abu Dhabi 'in touch with local authorities for ensuring adequate medical care.' MEA criticized the attack without naming Iran (strategic-autonomy continuity); explicit Hormuz freedom-of-navigation favoring US/UAE position. The 8M-Indian-diaspora-in-Gulf factor moved from theoretical to operational with this incident. INR ₹95.34 (+0.5% Tue, fresh record) — Day 2 sustained activation post-Apr 30 ₹95 breach; Mon May 4 close ₹95.10 broke ₹95. Nifty Mon +0.51% to 24,119 on election rally + April auto sales; Tue -0.8% intraday give-back. FII April outflow ₹60,847 cr; CY26 outflow ₹1.92 trillion (already exceeds ALL of CY25 ₹1.66T). India 10Y GOI eased -6 bps to 7.00% — RBI absorption + foreign FAR-debt bid; not yet defending INR via rates. Chabahar US sanctions waiver expired Apr 26 unchanged. Operation Sindhu evacuations 2,490 Apr 30. India's diplomatic-autonomy posture HOLDING but tested by direct citizen casualty.
